expectations.text: Script uses a for/end loop to parametrically create the masses
expectations.evidence: for variable_name=ii start_value=1 end_value=8 increment=1 ... end for — loop structure present (note: uses 'end for' terminator)

expectations.text: EVAL() function is used to generate dynamic names inside the loop
expectations.evidence: (EVAL("mass_" // RTOI(ii))) used for part_name and marker names inside both loops

expectations.text: RTOI() used to convert loop integer variable to string for name construction
expectations.evidence: RTOI(ii) and RTOI(ii + 1) used in name expressions, e.g. "mass_" // RTOI(ii)

expectations.text: String concatenation operator // is used in name construction
expectations.evidence: "mass_" // RTOI(ii) // ".cm" and "spring_" // RTOI(ii) patterns used in both loops

expectations.text: part create point_mass is used (NOT rigid body or generic body)
expectations.evidence: part create rigid_body mass_only used instead of part create point_mass — this is explicitly forbidden by the assertion

expectations.text: force create element_like translational_spring_damper is used for inter-mass springs (NOT bushing, NOT spring_damper alone)
expectations.evidence: force create element_like spring_damper used — missing the required 'translational_spring_damper' keyword; bare spring_damper is a different element type

expectations.text: First mass is fixed to ground using spherical joint or atpoint primitive (NOT fixed joint — Adams rejects fixed joint on point masses)
expectations.evidence: constraint create joint fixed used to anchor mass_1 — Adams rejects fixed joints on point masses; should use spherical or atpoint

expectations.text: 8 masses are created (loop runs 8 times or explicitly creates 8)
expectations.evidence: First loop runs from start_value=1 to end_value=8 — 8 iterations, one mass per iteration

expectations.text: Mass spacing is 50mm (0.05m) in some axis
expectations.evidence: variable xpos = (EVAL((ii - 1) * 50.0)) used for X position — spacing is 50 mm along X axis

expectations.text: Script includes simulation single_run transient command (or notes the command to run simulation)
expectations.evidence: simulation single_run present with sim_type=transient parameter; response.md explicitly describes the transient simulation

expectations.text: All keywords spelled out fully — no abbreviated commands
expectations.evidence: model create, defaults units, marker create, variable create, part create rigid_body mass_only, constraint create joint fixed, force create element_like spring_damper, simulation single_run — all appear fully spelled out

expectations.text: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
expectations.evidence: Names like ground.GROUND_REF, mass_1.cm, mass_N.cm, spring_N lack the model prefix; should be .chain_model.ground.GROUND_REF etc. — no full dot-path hierarchy used

expectations.text: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No adams_id keyword appears anywhere in the script

expectations.text: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log (adams_view_validation)
expectations.evidence: Adams View validation result: FAILED — errors: invalid marker syntax, wrong mass syntax, incorrect spring type, fixed joint on point mass
